name: campusvote-workspace
description: Master workspace for Amrapali University Vote

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.prod: npm run build --prefix client && npm start --prefix server
